HGSS.606.0000:
Bill: Hi, I’m Bill. And who are you?\f
Hmm, [0103,0000,0000], huh?\f
HGSS.606.0001:
You know what?
I’m the one who developed\r
the system to transfer Pokémon.\f
But it couldn’t have been done by
me alone.\f
For example, do you know the Hoenn
region? This girl Lanette from Hoenn\r
made the Pokémon Storage System\r
easier to use.\f
My friends all over the world are
working together to improve\r
the Pokémon trade and\r
storage systems.\f
I have to hurry on back to Goldenrod
and see my folks.\r
Buh-bye!\f
HGSS.606.0002:
Kimono Girls are so pretty.\f
The way the Kimono Girls dance and
the way they use their Pokémon are\r
both marvels.
HGSS.606.0003:
Morty, the Gym Leader, is soooo cool.\f
His Pokémon are really tough, too.
HGSS.606.0004:
Lake of Rage...
The appearance of a red GYARADOS...\r
I smell a conspiracy. I know it!
